title: SimpleHomePlugin
description: This plugin is a Home plugin. With /sethome you can set a home and with /home you can view your homes.
body:
🏠 LippelHome – Simple & Flexible Home System


Home Plugin
A simple and efficient home teleportation plugin for your Minecraft server.

What does this plugin do?
This plugin allows players to set personal home locations and teleport back to them at any time. It provides essential teleportation functionality that every survival server needs.

Features
Set multiple home locations with /sethome

View all your saved homes with /home

Teleport instantly to your homes

Easy to use commands

Lightweight and performance-friendly

Why download this plugin?
Players can easily return to their bases, farms, or favorite locations without long travel times. This improves the overall gameplay experience and makes server navigation more convenient for everyone.

Commands
/sethome - Set a new home at your current location

/home - View and teleport to your saved homes

Permissions
Configure who can use homes through your permissions plugin.
